info.title: GraphSense API
info.description: GraphSense API provides programmatic access to blockchain analytics data across multiple ledgers. Use it to explore addresses, entities, blocks, transactions, tags, token activity, and exchange-rate context, and to integrate investigation workflows into your own applications and automation.

get.summary: Get platform statistics for supported currencies
get.description: Returns per-currency platform statistics available in this API deployment.

get.summary: Search addresses, transactions, actors, and labels
get.description: Returns matching addresses, transactions, actors, and labels for the query with optional currency and result-type filters.

200.description: Search results grouped by requested result types.

get.description: Returns paginated address tags matching the provided label.

schema.description: Resumption token for retrieving the next page

schema.description: Number of items returned in a single page

get.summary: Get fiat exchange rates at a block height
get.description: Returns fiat exchange rates for the requested currency at the given block height.

200.description: Fiat exchange rates at the requested block height.

get.summary: List supported tokens for a currency
get.description: Returns token configurations supported for the requested base currency.

200.description: Supported token configurations for the currency.

post.summary: Stream bulk operation results as CSV
post.description: Executes a supported operation for multiple key values and streams flattened result rows as CSV.

200.description: Stream of flattened CSV rows for each requested key set.

400.description: Invalid operation name or request body parameters.

post.summary: Stream bulk operation results as JSON
post.description: Executes a supported operation for multiple key values and streams flattened result rows as JSON.

200.description: Stream of flattened JSON rows for each requested key set.

400.description: Invalid operation name or request body parameters.
